name: Lady Jin
page_title: Lady Jin  [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Wife of Jin Yi, left at home during the revolt. Accidentally told Wang Bi that Jin Yi was leading revolt.

full_text:
Lady Jin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Jin. Wife of Jin Yi, left at home during the revolt. Accidentally told Wang Bi that Jin Yi was leading revolt. Lady Jin may not have existed in history. Lady Jin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
